examples: There were 14 cases of congenital kyphosis, 5 cases of TB kyphosis and 4 cases of post-traumatic kyphosis.
Study Design. A case of acute celiac artery compression syndrome after spinal fusion in a patient with Scheuermann kyphosis is reported.
OBJECTIVE. : to evaluate 3 surgical approaches to determine the modality that has the greatest influence on improving thoracic kyphosis.
